title: Column summary for all subitems

posts.author: raphaelle (Raphaelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to have the Column summary displayed for the summary of subitems (for status, sum numbers, etc).

  • Example: I have subitems with numbers. I am showing the summary on the parent item. Now, I want to have the overall sum of all items. Same thing for statuses.
